title: Berechnungen und Datenverarbeitung

style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background: #FFFFFF (pure white, no grid, no pattern, no texture)
description: A compact illustration showing a simplified results list (NOT a code editor — no programming syntax, no terminal, no containing box or frame). At the top, a small gear/cog icon in #073B4C. Below, three result lines displayed as a clean vertical list directly on the white background: a checkmark icon followed by '2.847 Eintraege verarbeitet' in 12px #06D6A0, a checkmark icon followed by 'Berechnung abgeschlossen' in 12px #06D6A0, a right-arrow icon followed by 'Ergebnis.xlsx erstellt' in 12px #118AB2. The lines are spaced evenly with subtle gaps between them. The illustration conveys: Claude fuehrt Berechnungen aus und verarbeitet grosse Datenmengen direkt auf deinem Computer.
no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, hands, faces, stock photo elements, real brand logos, terminal/command line, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, glow effects, gradient fills, dark backgrounds, English text — all visible text must be German
